languages.original_text: "Your friend's skull that you keep beside you, priest. It serves as your eternal tribute to the Undying One, does it not?"

languages.text: "Череп друга, что ты носишь с собой, жрец. Это твое вечное напоминание о Неумирающем, не так ли?"
"Your friend's skull that you keep beside you, priest. It serves as your eternal tribute to the Undying One, does it not?"
languages.original_text: "Череп друга, что ты носишь с собой, жрец. Это твое вечное напоминание о Неумирающем, не так ли?"

traits.locale_text: "Your friend's skull that you keep beside you, priest. It serves as your eternal tribute to the Undying One, does it not?"
"Your friend's skull that you keep beside you, priest. It serves as your eternal tribute to the Undying One, does it not?"
"Your friend's skull that you keep beside you, priest. It serves as your eternal tribute to the Undying One, does it not?"

languages.text: «Sacerdote, la calavera de tu amigo que conservas a tu lado... es un tributo eterno al Inmortal, ¿me equivoco?».
languages.original_text: "Your friend's skull that you keep beside you, priest. It serves as your eternal tribute to the Undying One, does it not?"

traits.locale_text: «Sacerdote, la calavera de tu amigo que conservas a tu lado... es un tributo eterno al Inmortal, ¿me equivoco?».

languages.text: 「あなたが傍らに置く、その友の頭蓋……司祭よ。それは不死の者への、あなたの永遠なる供物。そうではないか？」
languages.original_text: "Your friend's skull that you keep beside you, priest. It serves as your eternal tribute to the Undying One, does it not?"

traits.locale_text: 「あなたが傍らに置く、その友の頭蓋……司祭よ。それは不死の者への、あなたの永遠なる供物。そうではないか？」

languages.text: “神甫，你随身带着挚友的头骨，那是对不死之神永恒的致敬，对吧？”
languages.original_text: "Your friend's skull that you keep beside you, priest. It serves as your eternal tribute to the Undying One, does it not?"

traits.locale_text: “神甫，你随身带着挚友的头骨，那是对不死之神永恒的致敬，对吧？”

languages.text: "Der Schädel Eures Freundes, den Ihr immer bei Euch habt, Priester. Er ist Euer ewiger Tribut an den Todlosen, oder?"
languages.original_text: "Your friend's skull that you keep beside you, priest. It serves as your eternal tribute to the Undying One, does it not?"

traits.locale_text: "Der Schädel Eures Freundes, den Ihr immer bei Euch habt, Priester. Er ist Euer ewiger Tribut an den Todlosen, oder?"

languages.text: « Le crâne de votre ami que vous gardez auprès de vous, prêtre... Il s'agit d'une offrande éternelle à l'Immortel, n'est-ce pas ? »
languages.original_text: "Your friend's skull that you keep beside you, priest. It serves as your eternal tribute to the Undying One, does it not?"

traits.locale_text: « Le crâne de votre ami que vous gardez auprès de vous, prêtre... Il s'agit d'une offrande éternelle à l'Immortel, n'est-ce pas ? »

languages.text: "Yanında taşıdığın arkadaşının o kafatası rahip. Ölmeyen'e ödediğin sonsuz haraç olarak hizmet ediyor, değil mi?"
languages.original_text: "Your friend's skull that you keep beside you, priest. It serves as your eternal tribute to the Undying One, does it not?"
